description: Perform a thin content audit on https://books.toscrape.com/ using Screaming Frog. Export the HTML crawl data including word counts to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Based on the crawl data, create a report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/thin_content_report.txt that includes the counts of pages with <100 words, 100-300 words, and >300 words, a list of the 5 thinnest page URLs, and remediation recommendations.
